name: CablesOnline 4" USB 3.0 20-Pin Motherboard Header Female to USB 2.0 8-Pin Male Adapter (USB3-AD24)
shortName: CablesOnline 4" USB 3.0 20-Pin Motherboard Header Female to USB 2.0
description: Motherboard header adapter converting USB 3.0 20-pin to USB 2.0 8-pin connectors for case front panel integration.
